# services.ytdl-sub

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ytdl-sub`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ytdl-sub.group` | `string` | Group under which ytdl-sub runs. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Configuration for ytdl-sub instances. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances.<name>.config` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Configuration for ytdl-sub. See <https://ytdl-sub.readthedocs.io/en/latest/config_reference/config_yaml.html> for more information. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ytdl-sub instance. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances.<name>.readWritePaths` | `list of absolute path` | List of paths that ytdl-sub can write to. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances.<name>.schedule` | `null or string` | How often to run ytdl-sub. See {manpage}`systemd.time(7)` for the format. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.instances.<name>.subscriptions` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Subscriptions for ytdl-sub. See <https://ytdl-sub.readthedocs.io/en/latest/config_reference/subscription_yaml.html> for more information. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.package` | `package` | The ytdl-sub package to use. |
| `services.ytdl-sub.user` | `string` | User account under which ytdl-sub runs. |
